chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-4614 / 2025 (M/s. Shakir Engineering Vs. Federation of Pakistan & Others) ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY 1) For hearing of CMA No. 19285/2025. 2) For hearing of main case. 24.11.2025. Dr. Shahab Imam, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, Advocate for Respondent No. 2 & 3. ___________________ Learned Counsel for Respondents No. 2 & 3 files parawise comments for Respondents No. 2 & 3 which are taken on record. It appears that after the Petition was filed, a Public Notice No. 14/2025 dated 25.09.2025 was issued by the Classification Committee which supported the department’s view on the classification of the subject goods however, subsequently, the FBR set aside Public Notice dated 14/2025 and remanded the matter to the Classification Committee for reconsideration vide Letter dated 03.11.2025. Presently, the question of classification of the Petitioner’s goods is pending before the Classification Committee. In such circumstances, we dispose of this Petition by restraining the Respondents from encashing Pay Order No. 06206624 dated 30.05.2025 until decision of the Classification Committee. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
